summary: Monte Carlo simulation from 3mo empirical data: median ~24535, P10=23678, P90=25418
content: Starting price: 24701.60 (Feb 17). 7 trading days to Feb 26. Mean daily return: -0.096%, std: 1.06%. Annualized vol: 16.8%. Recent 2-week decline of ~4.8%. Simulation uses full-sample drift which is slightly negative. Normal and t-dist give nearly identical results.
